---
title: "Ella Patten"
subtitle: "My Data Science Portfolio"
---

I'm a Computer Science student at Brigham Young University-Idaho with a passion for building things that actually help people.

For 18 months, I lived and served full-time in Curitiba, Brazil — an experience that shaped me personally and professionally in ways I'm still unpacking. I worked with diverse communities across the region, developed real cross-cultural communication and leadership skills, and picked up hands-on experience improving a data management and referral tracking system used across the region. Oh — and I became fluent in Português along the way.

I'm always looking for opportunities in software engineering, data, or technical operations where I can bring both my technical skills and my people skills to the table.

Let's connect if you're working on something meaningful.
